---
title: "Exercises"
---

The exercises are designed to be completed during the live sessions and reviewed afterward.

## Exercise list

1. [Decision tree](exercise-01-decision-tree.qmd)
2. [Markov model](exercise-02-markov-model.qmd)
3. [Microsimulation](exercise-03-microsimulation.qmd)
4. [Sensitivity analysis](exercise-04-sensitivity-analysis.qmd)
5. [Capstone exercise](capstone.qmd)
